260622_nmy-2_RNAi

Sam Zavislan-Pullaro

2026-06-22

  • load libraries
  • Import the data that was outputted from the new macro:
  • Create annotation columns
  • Align the erm-1 channel info
  • re-arrange the dataset and calculate the means
  • Try to create a metric of “membrane-y-ness” for each condition combo
  • Calculate the statistics
  • Session info

load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(gridExtra)
library(data.table)
library(rstatix)

Import the data that was outputted from the new macro:

Note:

channel 1 = set-3

channel 2 = erm-1

# import the control data
# control data comes from L4440 empty vector RNAi controls 
control_1 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-22_1458_datafile_for_230713_L4440_RNAi_rep1.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
control_2 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-22_153_datafile_for_230828_L4440_RNAi_rep2.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
control_3 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-22_156_datafile_for_240122_LP306_L4440-rep3.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")


# import RNAi treatment data 
test_1 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-24_1156_datafile_for_240113_NMY-2_RNAi-rep1.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_2 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-24_122_datafile_for_240122_LP306_NMY-2.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_3 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-24_129_datafile_for_240123_NMY-2_RNAi-rep2.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
test_4 <- read.table(file = "../01_input/2026-6-24_147_datafile_for_240221_LP306_NMY-2_RNAi-rep3.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")

# test its dimensions
#dim(control_1)
#dim(control_2)
#dim(test_1)
#dim(test_2)
#dim(test_3)
#dim(test_4)

# Rename the column names
col_times <- paste(rep(1:333), sep = "")
colnames(control_1) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(control_2) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(control_3) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)

colnames(test_1) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_2) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_3) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)
colnames(test_4) <- c("file", "channel", col_times)

# Check that the dimensions remain unchanged
dim(control_1)
## [1]  11 337
dim(control_2)
## [1]   5 337
dim(control_3)
## [1]   9 337
dim(test_1)
## [1]   5 337
dim(test_2)
## [1]  11 337
dim(test_3)
## [1]  15 337
dim(test_4)
## [1]   7 337
# control_1[1:9,1:8]
# control_2[1:9,1:8]
# control_3[1:9,1:8]

# test_1[1:9,1:8]
# test_2[1:9,1:8]
# test_3[1:9,1:8]
# test_4[1:9,1:8]

Create annotation columns

# Extract out the salient information from the filename and pivot the data longer - "permed" version
# Had to manually change image names to follow convention/consistency

control_1_exp <- control_1[2:dim(control_1)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
 
control_2_exp <- control_2[2:dim(control_2)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
 
control_3_exp <- control_3[2:dim(control_3)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_")) 

 
test_1_exp <- test_1[2:dim(test_1)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_2_exp <- test_2[2:dim(test_2)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_3_exp <- test_3[2:dim(test_3)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))

test_4_exp <- test_4[2:dim(test_4)[1],1:335] %>%
  separate_wider_delim(file, delim = "_", names = c("date", "strain", "treatment", "embryoID", NA)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = `1`:`333`, names_to = "xpoint", values_to = "intensity") %>%
  mutate(unique_id = paste(date, strain, treatment, embryoID, channel, sep = "_"))
# Add in the timepoints

addInTimepoints <- function(tibble) {
  timepoints <- as.vector(unlist(control_1[1,3:335]))
  repnumb = dim(tibble)[1]/333
  tibble::add_column(tibble, timepoints = rep(timepoints,repnumb), .after = "xpoint")
}

control_1_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_1_exp)
control_2_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_2_exp)
control_3_plustime <- addInTimepoints(control_3_exp)

test_1_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_1_exp)
test_2_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_2_exp)
test_3_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_3_exp)
test_4_plustime <- addInTimepoints(test_4_exp)

#check it
control_1_plustime[330:340,]
## # A tibble: 11 × 9
##    date  strain treatment embryoID channel xpoint timepoints intensity unique_id
##    <chr> <chr>  <chr>     <chr>    <chr>   <chr>       <dbl>     <dbl> <chr>    
##  1 2307… LP306  L4440     03       ch2     330        35.3       3885. 230713_L…
##  2 2307… LP306  L4440     03       ch2     331        35.4       3841. 230713_L…

##    <chr> <chr>  <chr>     <chr>    <chr>   <chr>       <dbl>     <dbl> <chr>    
##  1 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch2     330        35.3       3448. 240221_L…
##  2 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch2     331        35.4       3423. 240221_L…
##  3 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch2     332        35.5       3378. 240221_L…

##  6 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch1     2           0.107     1712. 240221_L…
##  7 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch1     3           0.214     1728. 240221_L…
##  8 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch1     4           0.322     1747. 240221_L…

## 11 2402… LP306  nmy-2     01       ch1     7           0.643     1806. 240221_L…
# Merge the datasets together 
nmy2_RNAi_data_total <- rbind(control_1_plustime, control_2_plustime, control_3_plustime, test_1_plustime, test_2_plustime, test_3_plustime, test_4_plustime)

# Set explicit order for facets
nmy2_RNAi_data_total$treatment <- factor(nmy2_RNAi_data_total$treatment,
                                          levels = c("nmy-2", "L4440"))

# Plot it - all samples
ggplot(data = nmy2_RNAi_data_total, aes(x = timepoints, y = intensity, group = c(unique_id))) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = unique_id))+
  facet_wrap(~ channel + treatment)+
  guides(color = "none")+
  theme_bw()

Align the erm-1 channel info

This step isn’t really necessary but can help align the erm-1 samples based on the peak. Any associated set-3 samples come along for the ride.

Ideas - consider removing this step.

# Split out channel 2
# channel_2_only <- nmy2_RNAi_data_total %>%
#   filter(channel == "ch2" & treatment == "L4440")
# unique(channel_2_only$embryoID, channel_2_only$date)
# # Split out channel 1
# channel_1_only <- nmy2_RNAi_data_total %>%
#   filter(channel == "ch1" | treatment == "nmy-2")

channel_2_only <- nmy2_RNAi_data_total %>%
  filter(channel == "ch2")

channel_1_only <- nmy2_RNAi_data_total %>%
  filter(channel == "ch1")

# Check that everything worked
dim(nmy2_RNAi_data_total)
## [1] 18648     9
dim(channel_2_only)
## [1] 9324    9
dim(channel_1_only)
## [1] 9324    9
# Align by finding max per variable and adjusting row_id
channel_2_dt <- as.data.table(channel_2_only)
#channel_2_only
channel_2_dt$xpoint <- as.integer(channel_2_dt$xpoint)
channel_2_dt[, aligned_row := xpoint - (which.max(intensity) - 1), by = unique_id]
#channel_2_dt
channel2_dcast <- dcast(channel_2_dt, strain + aligned_row ~ unique_id, value.var = "intensity")

#channel2_dcast
dim(channel2_dcast)
## [1] 408  30
# Create align rows for channel 1
channel_1_dt <- as.data.table(channel_1_only)
channel_1_dt$xpoint <- as.integer(channel_1_dt$xpoint)

# Create an aligned row for channel 1
dim(channel_1_dt)[1]
## [1] 9324
head(channel_1_dt)
##      date strain treatment embryoID channel xpoint timepoints intensity
##    <char> <char>    <fctr>   <char>  <char>  <int>      <num>     <num>
## 1: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      1     0.0000  2786.226
## 2: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      2     0.1072  2829.312
## 3: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      3     0.2144  2868.980
## 4: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      4     0.3215  2911.187
## 5: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      5     0.4287  2948.210
## 6: 230713  LP306     L4440       03     ch1      6     0.5359  2984.982
##                    unique_id
##                       <char>
## 1: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
## 2: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
## 3: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
## 4: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
## 5: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
## 6: 230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1
iterations = dim(channel_1_dt)[1]/333
aligned_row = rep(-166:166, iterations)
length(aligned_row)
## [1] 9324
channel_1_dt <- cbind(channel_1_dt, aligned_row)
channel1_dcast <- dcast(channel_1_dt, strain + aligned_row ~ unique_id, value.var = "intensity")

dim(channel1_dcast)
## [1] 333  30
# Merge back together
# Pivot long - ch2 Modified this!!!
colnames(channel2_dcast)
##  [1] "strain"                    "aligned_row"              
##  [3] "230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch2" "230713_LP306_L4440_04_ch2"
##  [5] "230713_LP306_L4440_08_ch2" "230713_LP306_L4440_10_ch2"
##  [7] "230713_LP306_L4440_12_ch2" "230828_LP306_L4440_05_ch2"
##  [9] "230828_LP306_L4440_07_ch2" "240113_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch2"
## [11] "240113_LP306_nmy-2_10_ch2" "240122_LP306_L4440_01_ch2"
## [13] "240122_LP306_L4440_06_ch2" "240122_LP306_L4440_08_ch2"
## [15] "240122_LP306_L4440_09_ch2" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_01_ch2"
## [17] "240122_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch2" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_06_ch2"
## [19] "240122_LP306_nmy-2_08_ch2" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_09_ch2"
## [21] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch2" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_05_ch2"
## [23] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_07_ch2" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_08_ch2"
## [25] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_09_ch2" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_11_ch2"
## [27] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_13_ch2" "240221_LP306_nmy-2_01_ch2"
## [29] "240221_LP306_nmy-2_04_ch2" "240221_LP306_nmy-2_12_ch2"
ch2_align_long <- channel2_dcast %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(strain, aligned_row), names_to = "unique_id", values_to = "intensity")
#channel2_dcast

# pivot long - ch1 Modified this!!!
colnames(channel1_dcast)
##  [1] "strain"                    "aligned_row"              
##  [3] "230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1" "230713_LP306_L4440_04_ch1"
##  [5] "230713_LP306_L4440_08_ch1" "230713_LP306_L4440_10_ch1"
##  [7] "230713_LP306_L4440_12_ch1" "230828_LP306_L4440_05_ch1"
##  [9] "230828_LP306_L4440_07_ch1" "240113_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch1"
## [11] "240113_LP306_nmy-2_10_ch1" "240122_LP306_L4440_01_ch1"
## [13] "240122_LP306_L4440_06_ch1" "240122_LP306_L4440_08_ch1"
## [15] "240122_LP306_L4440_09_ch1" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_01_ch1"
## [17] "240122_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch1" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_06_ch1"
## [19] "240122_LP306_nmy-2_08_ch1" "240122_LP306_nmy-2_09_ch1"
## [21] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_02_ch1" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_05_ch1"
## [23] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_07_ch1" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_08_ch1"
## [25] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_09_ch1" "240123_LP306_nmy-2_11_ch1"
## [27] "240123_LP306_nmy-2_13_ch1" "240221_LP306_nmy-2_01_ch1"
## [29] "240221_LP306_nmy-2_04_ch1" "240221_LP306_nmy-2_12_ch1"
ch1_align_long <- channel1_dcast %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(strain, aligned_row), names_to = "unique_id", values_to = "intensity")

# Check that all the colnames and data types match
colnames(ch2_align_long)
## [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "unique_id"   "intensity"
colnames(ch1_align_long)
## [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "unique_id"   "intensity"
str(ch2_align_long)
## tibble [11,424 × 4] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ strain     : chr [1:11424] "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" ...
##  $ aligned_row: num [1:11424] -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 -169 ...
##  $ unique_id  : chr [1:11424] "230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch2" "230713_LP306_L4440_04_ch2" "230713_LP306_L4440_08_ch2" "230713_LP306_L4440_10_ch2" ...
##  $ intensity  : num [1:11424] NA NA NA NA NA ...
str(ch1_align_long)
## tibble [9,324 × 4] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame)
##  $ strain     : chr [1:9324] "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" "LP306" ...
##  $ aligned_row: int [1:9324] -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 -166 ...
##  $ unique_id  : chr [1:9324] "230713_LP306_L4440_03_ch1" "230713_LP306_L4440_04_ch1" "230713_LP306_L4440_08_ch1" "230713_LP306_L4440_10_ch1" ...
##  $ intensity  : num [1:9324] 2786 4920 4884 6048 4449 ...
ch1_align_long$aligned_row <- as.numeric(ch1_align_long$aligned_row )

# Merge back together
total_align_long <- rbind(ch2_align_long, ch1_align_long)
total_align_long %>%
  group_by(aligned_row) %>%
  summarize(
    n_total = n(),
    n_na = sum(is.na(intensity)),
    pct_na = mean(is.na(intensity)) * 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(aligned_row) %>%
  print(n = Inf)
## # A tibble: 408 × 4
##     aligned_row n_total  n_na pct_na
##           <dbl>   <int> <int>  <dbl>

## 408         238      28    27  96.4

re-arrange the dataset and calculate the means

# Normalize the data by dividing by the embryo-specific mean
# nmy2_norm_total <- total_align_long %>%
#   separate_wider_delim(unique_id, delim = "_", names = c("date", NA, "treatment", "embryoID", "channel")) %>%
#   group_by(date, embryoID, channel, treatment) %>%
#   mutate(normalized_intensity = intensity / mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE))
# table(nmy2_norm_total$channel, nmy2_norm_total$treatment)

# Normalize the data by dividing by the embryo-specific mean
nmy2_norm_total <- total_align_long %>%
  separate_wider_delim(unique_id, delim = "_", names = c("date", NA, "treatment", "embryoID", "channel")) %>%
  mutate(treatment = factor(treatment, levels = c("nmy-2", "L4440"))) %>%
  group_by(date, embryoID, channel, treatment) %>%
  mutate(normalized_intensity = intensity / mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE))

head(nmy2_norm_total)
## # A tibble: 6 × 8
## # Groups:   date, embryoID, channel, treatment [6]
##   strain aligned_row date   treatment embryoID channel intensity
##   <chr>        <dbl> <chr>  <fct>     <chr>    <chr>       <dbl>
## 1 LP306         -169 230713 L4440     03       ch2            NA
## 2 LP306         -169 230713 L4440     04       ch2            NA
## 3 LP306         -169 230713 L4440     08       ch2            NA
## 4 LP306         -169 230713 L4440     10       ch2            NA
## 5 LP306         -169 230713 L4440     12       ch2            NA
## 6 LP306         -169 230828 L4440     05       ch2            NA
## # ℹ 1 more variable: normalized_intensity <dbl>
# Separate out the unique identifier info, then pivot sider
nmy2_wide_by_sample <- nmy2_norm_total %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(date, embryoID, channel, treatment), 
            values_from = normalized_intensity,
            id_cols = c(strain, aligned_row))


# Second Try - Separate out the unique identifier info, then pivot sider
nmy2_wide_by_sample <- nmy2_norm_total %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(date, embryoID), 
            values_from = normalized_intensity,
            id_cols = c(strain, aligned_row, treatment, channel))



colnames(nmy2_wide_by_sample)
##  [1] "strain"      "aligned_row" "treatment"   "channel"     "230713_03"  
##  [6] "230713_04"   "230713_08"   "230713_10"   "230713_12"   "230828_05"  
## [11] "230828_07"   "240113_02"   "240113_10"   "240122_01"   "240122_06"  
## [16] "240122_08"   "240122_09"   "240122_02"   "240123_02"   "240123_05"  
## [21] "240123_07"   "240123_08"   "240123_09"   "240123_11"   "240123_13"  
## [26] "240221_01"   "240221_04"   "240221_12"
# Play around with mean, medium, and sum:

nmy2_wide_with_stats <- nmy2_wide_by_sample %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    sum_signal    = sum(c_across(`230713_03`:`240123_13`), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_signal   = mean(c_across(`230713_03`:`240123_13`), na.rm = TRUE),
    median_signal = median(c_across(`230713_03`:`240123_13`), na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_signal     = sd(c_across(`230713_03`:`240123_13`), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

colnames(nmy2_wide_with_stats)
##  [1] "strain"        "aligned_row"   "treatment"     "channel"      
##  [5] "230713_03"     "230713_04"     "230713_08"     "230713_10"    
##  [9] "230713_12"     "230828_05"     "230828_07"     "240113_02"    
## [13] "240113_10"     "240122_01"     "240122_06"     "240122_08"    
## [17] "240122_09"     "240122_02"     "240123_02"     "240123_05"    
## [21] "240123_07"     "240123_08"     "240123_09"     "240123_11"    
## [25] "240123_13"     "240221_01"     "240221_04"     "240221_12"    
## [29] "sum_signal"    "mean_signal"   "median_signal" "sd_signal"
nmy2_wide_with_range <- nmy2_wide_with_stats %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(ymeanmax = sum(mean_signal, sd_signal) ) %>%
  mutate(ymeanmin = sum(mean_signal, -sd_signal)) 

colorselection = c("#000000", "#2189ce")

# Plot split by RNAi treatment
a <- ggplot(data = nmy2_wide_with_range, aes(x = aligned_row, y = mean_signal, group = interaction(channel, treatment)))+
  geom_line(aes(color=channel))+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorselection, aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"), labels = c("set-1 mRNA", "erm-1 mRNA"))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ymeanmin, ymax = ymeanmax, fill=channel), alpha = 0.2, ) +
  facet_wrap(~ treatment)+
  theme_bw()

a

#pdf(file = "../03_outputPlots/.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)

a

dev.off()
## null device 
##           1
# Plot in a different way - set-3 and erm-1 mRNA split into facets
colorselection = c("#2189ce", "#000000")
channel.labs <- c("set-3 mRNA", "erm-1 mRNA")
names(channel.labs) <- c("ch1", "ch2")

# Plot split by transcript
b <- ggplot(data = nmy2_wide_with_range, aes(x = aligned_row, y = mean_signal, group = interaction(channel, treatment)))+
  geom_line(aes(color=treatment))+
  scale_color_manual(values = colorselection, aesthetics = c("colour", "fill"), labels = c("control", "nmy-2 RNAi"))+
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ymeanmin, ymax = ymeanmax, fill=treatment), alpha = 0.2, ) +
  facet_wrap(~ channel, labeller = labeller(channel = channel.labs))+
  theme_bw()

b


# pdf(file = "../03_outputPlots/.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)
# 
# b

dev.off()
## null device 
##           1

Try to create a metric of “membrane-y-ness” for each condition combo

I want a metric that reports the ratio of erm-1 intensity signal at “0” (the peak) versus at -100 or +100. I’ll take the average of -100 and +100.

# extract the "peak" at 1 versus the -100 and +100 values
peaks_and_valleys <- nmy2_norm_total %>%
  filter(aligned_row %in% c(-100,1,100)) 

# Nest the -100, 1, and +100 values into a single cell
nest_pandv <- peaks_and_valleys %>%
  group_by(date, treatment, embryoID, channel) %>%
  nest()

# A function to calculate the ratio of the value at 1 compared to the mean of -100 and +100
# my_calc2 <- function(df) {
#   df$normalized_intensity[2] / mean(df$normalized_intensity[1], df$normalized_intensity[3])
# }

my_calc2 <- function(df) {
  df$normalized_intensity[2] / mean(c(df$normalized_intensity[1], df$normalized_intensity[3]))
}

# Calculate the ratio for each datapoint
foldChange_calc <- nest_pandv %>%
  mutate(fc_enrich = map_dbl(data, my_calc2))

# Change some columns to factors
foldChange_calc$treatment <- as.factor(foldChange_calc$treatment)
foldChange_calc$channel <- as.factor(foldChange_calc$channel)

# calculate the max & min - figure out how to set the y-axis
summary(log(foldChange_calc$fc_enrich, base = 2))
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max.    NA's 
## -0.1108  0.1562  0.2905  0.3429  0.4756  1.2529       1
# plot the data:
d <- ggplot(data = foldChange_calc, aes(x = as.factor(channel), y = log(fc_enrich, base = 2), fill = treatment))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitterdodge())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("L4440" = "darkgray", "nmy-2" = "lightblue"),
                   labels = c("L4440" = "L4440 control", "nmy-2" = "nmy-2 RNAi"))+labs(y = "log2 FoldChange Enrichment of mRNA \n(mRNA intensity at 0 / mean mRNA intensity at -100 and 100)", x = "mRNA") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("ch1" = "set-3", "ch2" = "erm-1"))+
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

d

e <- ggplot(data = foldChange_calc, aes(x = as.factor(treatment), y = log(fc_enrich, base = 2), fill = channel))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)+
  geom_jitter(position=position_jitterdodge())+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.5, 1.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(y = "log2 FoldChange Enrichment of mRNA \n(mRNA intensity at 0 / mean mRNA intensity at -100 and 100)", x = "mRNA") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

e

getwd()
## [1] "/Users/samzavislan/Desktop/onish/people/naly/projects/erm-1_LP306_RNAi/SZP260525_R_analysis/260622_newMacros/nmy-2_L4440/02_scripts"
library(dplyr)

foldChange_calc %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  summarise(
    min_val    = min(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE),
    median_val = median(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE),
    max_val    = max(log(fc_enrich, base = 2), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
## `summarise()` has regrouped the output.
## ℹ Summaries were computed grouped by treatment and channel.
## ℹ Output is grouped by treatment.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.groups = "drop_last")` to silence this message.
## ℹ Use `summarise(.by = c(treatment, channel))` for per-operation grouping
##   (`?dplyr::dplyr_by`) instead.
## # A tibble: 4 × 5
## # Groups:   treatment [2]
##   treatment channel  min_val median_val max_val
##   <fct>     <fct>      <dbl>      <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 nmy-2     ch1     -0.111        0.154   0.275
## 2 nmy-2     ch2      0.162        0.439   0.739
## 3 L4440     ch1     -0.00126      0.168   0.391
## 4 L4440     ch2      0.353        0.687   1.25
foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  slice(c(
    which.min(log2_fc),
    which(log2_fc == median(log2_fc)), 
    which.max(log2_fc)
  ))
## # A tibble: 11 × 7
## # Groups:   treatment, channel [4]
##    date   treatment embryoID channel data             fc_enrich  log2_fc
##    <chr>  <fct>     <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>    <dbl>
##  1 240123 nmy-2     11       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.926 -0.111  
##  2 240221 nmy-2     12       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.11   0.154  
##  3 240123 nmy-2     07       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.21   0.275  
##  4 240123 nmy-2     09       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.12   0.162  
##  5 240113 nmy-2     10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.67   0.739  
##  6 230713 L4440     12       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.999 -0.00126
##  7 230713 L4440     03       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.12   0.168  
##  8 240122 L4440     08       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.31   0.391  
##  9 230713 L4440     12       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.28   0.353  
## 10 230713 L4440     03       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.61   0.687  
## 11 240122 L4440     01       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     2.38   1.25
df <- foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  mutate(med = median(log2_fc))

label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc))              %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med)))   %>% mutate(label = "median"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc))              %>% mutate(label = "max")
)
foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  filter(log2_fc == min(log2_fc) | log2_fc == max(log2_fc))
## # A tibble: 6 × 7
## # Groups:   treatment, channel [3]
##   date   treatment embryoID channel data             fc_enrich  log2_fc
##   <chr>  <fct>     <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>    <dbl>
## 1 230713 L4440     12       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.28   0.353  
## 2 240122 L4440     01       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>     2.38   1.25   
## 3 230713 L4440     12       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.999 -0.00126
## 4 240122 L4440     08       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.31   0.391  
## 5 240123 nmy-2     07       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     1.21   0.275  
## 6 240123 nmy-2     11       ch1     <tibble [3 × 4]>     0.926 -0.111
library(ggrepel)

df <- foldChange_calc %>%
  mutate(log2_fc = log(fc_enrich, base = 2)) %>%
  group_by(treatment, channel) %>%
  mutate(med = median(log2_fc))

label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc))            %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med))) %>% mutate(label = "median"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc))            %>% mutate(label = "max")
) %>%
  # Keep only one label per row — if min/median/max land on same row, 
  # priority: min > max > median
  group_by(treatment, channel, date, embryoID) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()
label_points <- bind_rows(
  df %>% slice(which.min(log2_fc)) %>% mutate(label = "min"),
  df %>% slice(which.max(log2_fc)) %>% mutate(label = "max"),
  df %>% filter(n() >= 3) %>% 
         slice(which.min(abs(log2_fc - med))) %>% mutate(label = "median")
) %>%
  distinct(treatment, channel, date, embryoID, .keep_all = TRUE)
library(ggrepel)

e + geom_label_repel(
  data = label_points,
  aes(x = as.factor(treatment), y = log2_fc,
      label = paste(label, paste(date, embryoID, sep = "_"), sep = ": "),
      fill = channel),
  position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),  # matches geom_boxplot default
  size = 3,
  alpha = 0.8,
  max.overlaps = 20,
  show.legend = FALSE
)
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

## Save the datasets


# set plotname
today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")
filename <- paste("../03_outputPlots/", today, "nmy-2_L4440.pdf", sep = "")

pdf(filename, width = 6, height = 6)
d
dev.off()

getwd()

Calculate the statistics

foldChange_calc
## # A tibble: 56 × 6
## # Groups:   date, treatment, embryoID, channel [56]
##    date   treatment embryoID channel data             fc_enrich
##    <chr>  <fct>     <chr>    <fct>   <list>               <dbl>
##  1 230713 L4440     03       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.61
##  2 230713 L4440     04       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.44
##  3 230713 L4440     08       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.75
##  4 230713 L4440     10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.32
##  5 230713 L4440     12       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.28
##  6 230828 L4440     05       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.33
##  7 230828 L4440     07       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.52
##  8 240113 nmy-2     02       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.37
##  9 240113 nmy-2     10       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      1.67
## 10 240122 L4440     01       ch2     <tibble [3 × 4]>      2.38
## # ℹ 46 more rows
stats_wilcox <- foldChange_calc %>%
  group_by(channel) %>%
  wilcox_test(fc_enrich ~ treatment) %>%
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance()

stats_wilcox
## # A tibble: 2 × 10
##   channel .y.     group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic      p  p.adj p.adj.signif
##   <fct>   <chr>   <chr>  <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl> <chr>       
## 1 ch1     fc_enr… nmy-2  L4440     17    11        70 0.285  0.285  ns          
## 2 ch2     fc_enr… nmy-2  L4440     16    11        45 0.0343 0.0686 ns
### Run Welch's t-test to confirm same result 
stats_ttest <- foldChange_calc %>%
  group_by(channel) %>%
  t_test(fc_enrich ~ treatment) %>%
  group_by(channel) %>%              # re-add grouping, lost by t_test()
  adjust_pvalue(method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance()
stats_ttest
## # A tibble: 2 × 11
##   channel .y.       group1 group2    n1    n2 statistic    df      p  p.adj
##   <fct>   <chr>     <chr>  <chr>  <int> <int>     <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>  <dbl>
## 1 ch1     fc_enrich nmy-2  L4440     17    11     -1.32  16.9 0.204  0.204 
## 2 ch2     fc_enrich nmy-2  L4440     16    11     -2.32  13.8 0.0361 0.0361
## # ℹ 1 more variable: p.adj.signif <chr>
